message:
fix(storage): resolve clippy if_not_else and cmp_owned lints in connection bootstrap

Invert the :memory: path check to positive-first style and compare
against &str directly instead of constructing a PathBuf, fixing two
clippy::pedantic lints that were breaking workspace-wide clippy -D
warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
